mapper.insert: insert into shopping_cart (user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, name, image, dish_flavor, number, amount, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{dishId}, #{setmealId}, #{name}, #{image}, #{dishFlavor}, #{number}, #{amount}, #{createTime})

insert into shopping_cart (user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, name, image, dish_flavor, number, amount, create_time) values (#{item.userId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.setmealId}, #{item.name}, #{item.image}, #{item.dishFlavor}, #{item.number}, #{item.amount}, #{item.createTime})
